name: lol_get_champion_analysis
description: Returns detailed champion stats (win/pick/ban rates), optimal builds (items, runes, skills, spells), skill combos, counter matchups, and team synergies for a specific champion and position. MUST call when user mentions any champion, asks for item/skill recommendations, gameplay tips, or matchup strategies. Counter picks available in weak_counters field. Infer position from context if not specified.

champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE Examples: ANNIE, OLAF, GALIO

lang.description: Locale code Examples: ar_AE, cs_CZ, de_DE

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract

name: lol_get_champion_synergies
description: Returns synergy recommendations (win rate + role fit) for your champion and the ally lane you specify.

champion.description: Your champion Examples: ANNIE, OLAF, GALIO

synergy_position.description: The position you want synergy recommendations for (teammate position)

lang.description: Locale code Examples: ar_AE, cs_CZ, de_DE

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- champion
- data.synergies[].synergy_tier_data.{rank,rank_prev,rank_prev_patch,tier}
- data.synergies[].{champion_id,champion_name,play,position,score,score_rank,synergy_champion_id,synergy_champion_name,synergy_position,win,win_rate}
- lang
- my_position
- synergy_position

Field descriptions:
- synergies.*.synergy_tier_data.tier: Synergy tier (0=OP, 1=S, 2=A, 3=B, 4=C)

name: lol_get_lane_matchup_guide
description: Provides lane matchup guidance for your champion versus a named opponent, including position-specific tips, runes, and item timings.

lang.description: Locale code Examples: ar_AE, cs_CZ, de_DE

position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

my_champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE Examples: ANNIE, OLAF, GALIO

opponent_champion.description: Champion name in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE Examples: ANNIE, OLAF, GALIO

name: lol_list_champions
description: Returns every champion's id, key, name, and release date in the requested language.

lang.description: Locale code Examples: ar_AE, cs_CZ, de_DE

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
desired_output_fields.description:
Select ONLY from fields below. This is a CLOSED SET. Do NOT invent new field names.

Available fields:
- data.champions[].{champion_id,key,name,release_date}
- lang

Field descriptions:
- key: Champion key (internal code name, e.g., MonkeyKing for Wukong)

name: lol_list_lane_meta_champions
description: Returns lane-by-lane champion tiers with win/pick/ban rates, KDA, and tier rankings. Tier 1 champions are OP and easy to play - recommend them for strong picks. Filter by position or use "all" for every lane.

lang.description: Locale code Examples: ar_AE, cs_CZ, de_DE

position.description: Lane position (top, mid, jungle, adc, support)

desired_output_fields.title: Output fields to extract
